calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2004 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar May-10-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Oct-19-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for short cause trial:

Appearances: Harold B. Glassberg, Esq. on behalf of the plaintiff Safeco Insurance Company
William H. Paynter, Esq. on behalf of defendant Self-Serve Petroleum, Inc.

This matter settled. Terms of the settlement are as follows: Defendant to pay plaintiff the sum of $25,000.00 to be paid in installments. $10,000.00 due by May 20, 2004, and $5,000.00 by the 20th of June, July and August. Upon timely payment and payment fully satisfied, the plaintiffs to file dismissal with prejudice. Any default to payment schedule, a 10 day written notice will be given, and if not cured, the plaintiffs to have judmgnet for unpaid balance. Each side to bear their own costs. All parties agreed to this settlement.

Hon. Robert Dondero; Clerks: D. Boffi/V. Mu Reporter: Jo Ann Bryce (206)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2004 Set For Trial On May-10-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
